schedules.description: Apex morning protocol — brain + body integrated daily plan (8am)

DBH keyword ranking tracker — pull GSC data for all 37 keywords across NZ/AUS/USA (6:30am daily)
AI visibility check — query ChatGPT/Claude/Perplexity/Gemini for DBH citations (Sunday 3am)
Weekly Tony CEO report generation (Monday 7am)

Apex evening debrief — primary data collection, pattern analysis (7pm)
Meridian DBH morning ops brief

Compass life reflection session (Thursday 6pm)

ASI evening reading — life mentor lesson (8:30pm)
Daily replenishment scan — fire Klaviyo reorder events (10pm, background)
Beacon SEO article generation (10pm daily, background)
Nightly customer intelligence DB sync (11pm, background)
Meta ROAS verification against Shopify (11:15pm, background)
Rule-based Asana task creation (11:30pm, background)
Auto-optimizer: budget adjustments, A/B winners, campaign drafts (11:45pm, background)
Daily snapshot — locks calendar day figures at 11:59pm NZST (background)

Regenerate llms.txt for AEO (1st of month, 3am, background)

Atlas weekly deep analysis (Sunday 8am)

Vesper daily company discovery scan + pipeline status brief (7am)
Odysseus daily financial reality + wealth builder lesson (6:30am)
Marcus daily stoic morning wisdom — small practice for today (6:45am)

Strategos daily PG/wealth management industry lesson (7:30pm)
Monthly CPA:LTV cohort analysis (1st of month, 6am, background)
Prospector daily first-principles opportunity analysis (11am, Tue-Sun)
Prospector weekly opportunity synthesis + daily analysis (Monday 11am)
Flush DND-held messages at 6am when Do Not Disturb ends
Clean up conversation history older than 7 days (3:30am daily)
